<!-- Adding a tool? Check each box. -->

**Tool name and URL:**

- [ ] It does at least one SEO or GEO job end to end, with no human step in between.
- [ ] It is in the right section and in alphabetical order.
- [ ] The description is one plain sentence about what it does, with no marketing adjectives.
- [ ] The link goes to the tool's own site and works.
- [ ] One tool in this pull request.
- [ ] I disclosed any relationship I have with the tool.

**Why it clears the bar (one or two lines):**
